title: CommandEnvelope
description: Server -> device. A single command. The server MUST NOT send a command whose requiresCapability is absent from the device's latest capability matrix.

commandId.description: UUID; idempotency key. Device must dedupe by this.

ttlSeconds.description: Drop if older than this when received. 0 = no expiry.

type.description: Open registry (registry.md). Unknown types -> device replies status=unsupported.

requiresCapability.description: Capability key the device must advertise. Server self-checks before sending.

payload.description: Type-specific. Schemas for each type live in payloads/ as the registry grows.
